stemHtml: An aircraft with the call sign Flugprop 565 is in the cruise at FL180 heading south, passing the waypoint RODRI, in contact with Brussels Control. Suddenly a fire develops on board and immediately the pilot decides to descend to FL70 and divert to the nearest suitable airport Brussels-Charleroi (EBCI), located to the right of track. What is the recommended order to communicate this emergency situation to ATC?

options.a: Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, Brussels Control, Flugprop 565, passing RODRI, fire on board, descending FL70 and turning right to Charleroi, diverting, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday.
options.b: Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, Brussels Control, Flugprop 565, fire on board, diverting to Charleroi, position RODRI, descending FL70, heading 180°.
options.c: Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, Brussels Control, turning right to Charleroi due to fire on board, descending FL70, passing RODRI, diverting, Flugprop 565.
options.d: Brussels Control, Flugprop 565, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, descending FL70, turning right to Charleroi, passing RODRI, fire on board.
